title: Control Memory Management Policies on a Node — Memory manager reserved memory syntax
text:
Here are some examples of how to set the
reservedMemory
configuration for the kubelet.
# Example 1
reservedMemory
:
-
numaNode
:
0
# NUMA node index
limits
:
memory
:
"1Gi"
# byte quantity
-
numaNode
:
1
limits
:
memory
:
"2Gi"
# byte quantity
# Example 2
reservedMemory
:
-
numaNode
:
0
limits
:
"memory":
"512Gi"
-
numaNode
:
1
limits
:
"memory":
"512Gi"
"hugepages-1Gi":
"2Gi"
# only relevant on Linux
